privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Java project (network-module) created during setup. SecureDataTransmitter.java initially extends LegacySocket, which has four public methods: connectInsecure() and getRawStream() are forbidden methods that should not be accessible after refactoring; sendData(String) and close() are required methods that must be delegated. The refactoring should replace inheritance with a delegate field of type LegacySocket, exposing only the two required methods.
